DiagnosticLogging.desc: Write detailed diagnostic logs to the developer log (TINB.ArticulatedBuses.log). Off by default; turn it on to help diagnose a problem or file a bug report.
RemoveAllArticulatedBuses.desc: Use this option if you plan to remove the mod: removes every articulated bus (front and trailer) from the city, so you can make a fully clean save beforehand. Saves work fine without the mod anyway. This is simply a precaution to be 100% on the safe side. Transport lines and depots are kept and will send out new buses. Can also be used to tidy up an existing save at any time.
RemoveAllArticulatedBuses.warn: Remove ALL articulated buses from the city? Transport lines and depots are kept.
